scenarios.reason: Operating system Windows Server 2022 is already on a current supported release.

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch to standard Linux Operating System
scenarios.reason: Windows Server 2022 is not a standard Linux platform and can be standardized onto enterprise Linux.
The application has cloud or container portability characteristics that make ARM migration feasible.
Application server Microsoft IIS 10.0 is current.

scenarios.scenario_name: Application Migration to Cloud Infrastructure (Lift & Shift)
scenarios.reason: The application is already fully deployed in AWS.
The recorded architecture (2-Tier) suggests a layered or monolithic design suitable for decoupling.
Database engine PostgreSQL 14 is OUTDATED and should be upgraded.
PostgreSQL 14 is not a managed database service and could be moved to a managed offering.
A managed database move would also enable ARM-based managed database optimization.
Serverless database migration is targeted at cloud workloads with database sizes below 100GB.
